## What this changes
A short description of the change and why.

Closes #

## Checklist
- [ ] Output stays plain Markdown — no required tooling or build step.
- [ ] **Sections kept in sync.** If you added, removed or renamed a section, I updated it in *all* the places it lives: both skills (`skills/*/SKILL.md`), the EN and PL templates, the EN and PL examples, and the summaries in both READMEs. (See [CONTRIBUTING → Keeping files in sync](CONTRIBUTING.md).)
- [ ] Templates/skills still work both ways: download-and-fill *and* via Claude Code.
- [ ] No private personal or client data in examples — used realistic but fictional stand-ins.
- [ ] Added a line to [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md) if this touches the skills or templates.
